Variable Tests

Site name: {{site.name}}

Package version: {{pkg.version}}

Nested path: {{site.footer.text}}

Page title: {{page.title}}

Assign Tests

{% assign greeting = 'Hello from Liquid' %} {% assign number = 100 %} {% assign fromVar = site.author %}

{{greeting}}

Number: {{number}}

From variable: {{fromVar}}

Conditional Tests

Header is enabled

Title: {{site.title}}

{% else %}

No header

{% endif %} {% if user.isAdmin %}

Admin Controls

{% endif %} {% if user.isLoggedIn %}

Welcome, {{user.name}}

{% if user.isAdmin %} Dashboard {% else %} Profile {% endif %} {% else %} Please login {% endif %}

Render Tests

{% render 'header', title: 'My Header', navigation: 'Home | About | Contact' %} {% assign cardTitle = 'Dynamic Card' %} {% render 'card', heading: cardTitle, content: 'This card uses variables', tag: 'test' %} {% render 'card', heading: site.title, content: site.description, tag: 'featured' %}
{% render 'button', label: 'Primary Action', type: 'primary' %} {% render 'button', label: 'Secondary', type: 'secondary' %} {% render 'button', label: 'Danger', type: 'danger' %}

Combined Feature Tests

{% assign showCards = site.features.showCards %} {% if showCards %}
{% render 'card', heading: 'Card 1', content: site.card1Text, tag: 'new' %} {% render 'card', heading: 'Card 2', content: site.card2Text, tag: 'popular' %} {% if user.isAdmin %} {% render 'card', heading: 'Admin Card', content: 'Admin only', tag: 'admin' %} {% endif %}
{% else %}

Cards are disabled

{% endif %} {% assign ctaLabel = 'Get Started Now' %} {% render 'button', label: ctaLabel, type: 'primary' %}
{% if site.footer.enabled %}

{{site.footer.text}}

Version {{pkg.version}}

{% else %}

Minimal footer

{% endif %}
